actions.value:
On January 23rd, Thorchain nodes voted to pause the Savers and Lending programs in order to safeguard the network. Deposits and withdrawals for Savers staking were halted for 90-days while their team restructured and stabilize the network. For more information on this, please see this update: https://edge.app/blog/company-news/thorchain-savers-halts

 

Following the restructure of ThorFi, any users staking assets in the Thorchain Savers program are now able to claim their ThorChain Yield tokens ($TCY) allocation in proportion to the dollar value of their staked assets when the Savers and Lending vaults were halted.

 

More information on how to claim and manage your TCY stake can be found here: https://support.edge.app/hc/en-us/articles/36640943008923-How-to-claim-and-manage-your-TCY-stake-in-Edge-THORChain-Yield-token

 

Please let us know if you have any questions.
